title: We Can Source It Ltd – 1000 x Clear Strong Plastic Full Pint Cups - 20oz Disposable Beer Glasses Tumblers – 570ml BPA-Free Plastic Cocktail Glasses with CE Marking – Recyclable Tumblers for Parties
features: 𝐁𝐏𝐀-𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄 𝐀𝐒𝐒𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄: Our plastic cups are BPA-free, ensuring non-toxic, safe drinks. These plastic and disposable beer glasses give you peace of mind, making them perfect for serving beer, or soft drinks at any event.

𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋𝐒: Built from strong Flexi Polypropylene, these plastic full pint glasses are more durable than paper cups, resisting cracks and breaks. Ideal for parties, these disposable sturdy plastic cups hold up well and provide a reliable drinking experience.

𝐅𝐔𝐋𝐋 𝐏𝐈𝐍𝐓 𝐌𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐔𝐑𝐄: Designed to hold a pint 20oz / 568ml to the brim, they are CE Marked ensuring accurate measures for your beverages. Its simple design makes it perfect for a variety of beverages so you can stock your shelves and never be without this convenient, disposable cup.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐄: Whether it's a BBQ, sports event, or bar, these plastic tumblers are ideal for serving everything. Choose these party and disposable cups for a convenient, stylish alternative to glassware at your next gathering.

𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓: Made from durable, disposable plastic, these clear plastic cups are designed for single use, ensuring hassle-free cleanup. Perfect for serving beer or other drinks, these plastic glasses and tumblers are a practical choice for parties, events, and gatherings.
description: Product Description Beer Glasses AVAILABLE SIZES These plastic beer glasses are a much smarter option compared to disposable plastic cups or paper cups, which can end up in landfills. 10oz Half Pint 20oz Pin Beer Glasses CE marked These glasses are affordable and durable, making them a cost-effective option for businesses and individuals who need to serve a large number of people. FEATURES: Pint to brim CE. They are lightweight. More affordable than glass ones. Easily to replace if lost or damaged. Affordable and reusable. EASY TO CLEAN These glasses are durable and easy to clean. They are also lightweight and easy to handle, making them a preferred option for serving beer to large groups of people. STURDY DESIGN Our sturdy design allows for easy product separation, Nicely rolled full rim for easy sipping, and is made of food-safe grade high-quality clear recyclable PP. SHATTERPROOF Unlike glass, plastic is less prone to breakage, which makes it a safer option for outdoor events and festivals where people may be moving around or dancing.
